name: Crossbow
notes: Crossbow ** Hand crossbows may be fired with one hand but require two hands to load and ready. (+20) (-10) (-50) (-100) Blank (+0) (-25) Medium Extreme Absurd Point Short Long Crossbow Hand Crossbow (1H)** 10' 30' 60' 90' 120' 150' Crossbow (2H) 10' 70' 140' 210' 280' 350' Heavy Crossbow (2H) 20' 80' 160' 240' 320' 400' ** Hand crossbows may be fired with one hand but require two hands to load and ready.

name: Crush
notes: Unarmed Falling Add the falling distance, in feet, to the attack roll. If the character jumped down, subtract their height. The attack size is the same as the size of the falling character. Falling Objects If the falling object is larger than the target, use this table, otherwise use the Rock table. Add the distance the object fell, in feet. The size of the attack depends on the size of the falling object. Shields may not be used against falling objects larger than the target.
